movie.title: Kaatru Veliyidai - Qaidi The Jail Break (2017) [Hindi ORG & Tamil] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Kaatru Veliyidai (2017) Romance is in the air as the lives of Fighter Pilot Varun & Medical Doctor Leela collide amidst the scenic beauty of Kashmir. While Leela yearns for Varun’s affection in the delicate of ways, Varun’s idea of love is all give-give, not give-take. Just as the avalanche of built-up emotions sets rolling, Varun becomes a PoW post the Kargil episode. Do their paths cross later?
